---
title: "Resume"
description: "Downloadable resume and brief professional summary."
---

::: {.two-col}
::: {}
I am a computational physicist and scientific machine learning researcher specializing in high-performance multi-physics simulation, energetic materials, shock physics, and physics-aware deep learning.

My work spans solver development, microstructure-resolved DNS, HPC production campaigns, and simulation-grounded ML evaluation for energetic-material response under extreme loading.

<div class="actions">
  <a class="button primary" href="assets/Shobhan_Roy_Industry_Resume.pdf">Download Resume</a>
  <a class="button" href="publications.qmd">Publications</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.callout}
### Current Focus

- Shock-to-detonation simulation
- Energetic-material microstructures
- Physics-aware surrogate modeling
- HPC-scale DNS and validation
- Scientific AI workflows
:::
:::

## Highlights

- 7 peer-reviewed journal papers across **Shock Waves**, **Journal of Applied Physics**, **Journal of Fluid Mechanics**, and **APL Machine Learning**.
- Production HPC campaigns resolving sub-micron damage features at 140M-cell, 7,000-core, ~2.8M CPU-hour scale.
- Multi-institution research interfaces across AFOSR-MURI, ONR-MURI, UIUC, LANL, UVA, IIT Delhi, and IIT Madras collaborations.
- Mentoring of 2 PhD students on simulation methodology, HPC workflows, and SCIMITAR3D adoption.
